creator: empty.japan
caption:
Number 3 in my top 10 secret places where you will not meet any tourists - Kochidani Amida-ji Temple 阿弥陀寺 
I found this place accidentally during winter. Saw those metal metal bars blocking the entrance and thought it was abandoned. I was so surprised when I came back there today to discover that this Temple is hidden deep in the forest and that it was simply closed to visitors in January and February.
This time I was absolutely speechless - and now this place is one of my favorites in whole Japan 🥹I hope you will feel the same during your visit 🥰
By the way, I am working on a travel guide to this area, as it is packed with incredible places worth visiting 🤫
I have an important question for you - which areas of Japan you would love to visit the most and check out its itineraries?
